intended_use: CINA-VCF is a radiological computer aided triage and notification software indicated for use in patients aged 50 years and over undergoing non-enhanced or contrast-enhanced CT scans which include the
intended_use_full: CINA-VCF is a radiological computer aided triage and notification software indicated for use in patients aged 50 years and over undergoing non-enhanced or contrast-enhanced CT scans which include the chest and/or abdomen. The device is intended to assist hospital networks and appropriately trained medical specialists within the standard-of-care bone health setting in workflow triage by flagging and communication of suspected positive cases of Vertebral Compression Fractures (VCF) findings.
target_condition: Vertebral Compression Fractures (VCF) at T1-L5 spine level
ground_truth: Consensus of three US-board-certified expert radiologists; a case was considered positive if at least one moderate or severe vertebral compression fracture located within the thoracic or lumbar spine was identified
other_metrics: Time-to-notification (mean all cases): 23.4 ± 8.4 seconds [95% CI: 22.7 - 24.2]; Time-to-notification (true positive cases): 21.7 ± 7.5 seconds [95% CI: 20.5 - 22.8]
